rationale: The citing paper explicitly frames itself as extending prior numerical-information research on how number formats affect judgment, and the cited paper is a directly relevant prior study on numerical/price judgments driven by metacognitive computation ease. With only DOI-level match evidence and no in-text snippet, it is still safer to keep for full relation judgment than to drop.
